inputs.label: Liter per Barrel
inputs.businessContext: Default is for US oil barrel (42 US gallons). Adjust for other barrel types.

businessContext_i18n.en: Default is for US oil barrel (42 US gallons). Adjust for other barrel types.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varsayılan ABD petrol varili (42 ABD galonu) içindir. Diğer varil türleri için ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard ist US-Ölfass (42 US-Gallonen). Für andere Fasstypen anpassen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La valeur par défaut est pour le baril de pétrole US (42 gallons US). Ajustez pour les autres types de barils.
businessContext_i18n.es: El valor predeterminado es para barril de petróleo estadounidense (42 galones US). Ajuste para otros tipos de barril.

inputs.label: Volume Correction Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for temperature correction. Use 1 if no correction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier for temperature correction. Use 1 if no correction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıcaklık düzeltmesi için çarpan. Düzeltme yoksa 1 kullanın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für Temperaturkorrektur. 1 verwenden, wenn keine Korrektur.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Multiplicateur pour correction de température. Utilisez 1 si pas de correction.
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador para corrección de temperatura. Use 1 si no hay corrección.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
